message:
fix(e2e): replace page.evaluate() with addInitScript() for webkit auth (#9096) (#9151)

WebKit/Safari fires the auth redirect synchronously during script
evaluation. Using page.evaluate() to set localStorage after page.goto()
means the token arrives *after* the app has already checked auth state
and initiated a redirect to /login.

page.addInitScript() injects the localStorage seed before any page
script executes, so the auth guard sees the token on its first read —
consistent with how helpers/setup.ts::setupDemoMode already works.

Affected files (all in the nightly cross-browser run):
  - Clusters.spec.ts
  - Dashboard.spec.ts (4 occurrences)
  - Events.spec.ts
  - Login.spec.ts
  - Settings.spec.ts
  - Sidebar.spec.ts
  - Tour.spec.ts (refactored to pass tourCompleted flag via addInitScript)
  - custom-dashboard.spec.ts
  - navbar-responsive.spec.ts
  - responsive-regression.spec.ts
  - spa-routes.spec.ts

Fixes #9096

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,8 +28,12 @@ const KEY_ROUTES = [
 ]
 
 async function setupDemoMode(page: Page) {
-  await page.goto('/login')
-  await page.evaluate(() => {
+  // Seed localStorage BEFORE any page script runs so the auth guard sees
+  // the token on first execution. page.evaluate() runs after the page has
+  // already parsed and executed scripts, which is too late for webkit/Safari
+  // where the auth redirect fires synchronously on script evaluation.
+  // page.addInitScript() injects the snippet ahead of any page code (#9096).
+  await page.addInitScript(() => {
     localStorage.setItem('token', 'demo-token')
     localStorage.setItem('kc-demo-mode', 'true')
     localStorage.setItem('demo-user-onboarded', 'true')

@@ -62,8 +62,12 @@ const ALL_ROUTES = [
 ]
 
 async function setupDemoMode(page: Page) {
-  await page.goto('/login')
-  await page.evaluate(() => {
+  // Seed localStorage BEFORE any page script runs so the auth guard sees
+  // the token on first execution. page.evaluate() runs after the page has
+  // already parsed and executed scripts, which is too late for webkit/Safari
+  // where the auth redirect fires synchronously on script evaluation.
+  // page.addInitScript() injects the snippet ahead of any page code (#9096).
+  await page.addInitScript(() => {
     localStorage.setItem('token', 'demo-token')
     localStorage.setItem('kc-demo-mode', 'true')
     localStorage.setItem('demo-user-onboarded', 'true')
